response:
<<IMPLEMENTING GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET>>  
<<WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING>>  
<<COMPARING PERFORMANCE WITH MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL>>  

<<LOAD DIGITS DATASET>>  
<<IS A COMMONLY USED DATASET FOR TEXT CLASSIFICATION>>  
<<IT CONTAINS 1797 SEEDS AND 1797 CLASSES>>  
<<EACH SEED IS A 8-DIMENSIONAL IMAGE>>  
<<THE DATASET IS USED FOR BINARY CLASSIFICATION>>  

<<GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM>>  
<<IS A PROBABILISTIC CLASSIFICATION ALGORITHM>>  
<<IT ASSUMES THAT FEATURES ARE INDEPENDENT>>  
<<IT USES THE GAUSSIAN DISTRIBUTION FOR PREDICTION>>  
<<IT IS WELL-KNOWN FOR ITS SIMPLETY AND EFFICIENCY>>  

<<CROSS-VALIDATION>>  
<<IS USED TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE>>  
<<IT DIVIDES DATA INTO TRAINING AND TEST SETS>>  
<<IT HELPS TO PREVENT OVERFITTING>>  
<<IT PROVIDES A MORE RELIABLE ESTIMATE OF MODEL PERFORMANCE>>  

<<HYPERPARAMETER TUNING>>  
<<IS USED TO OPTIMIZE MODEL PARAMETERS>>  
<<IT INCLUDES PARAMETERS LIKE MEAN AND VARIANCE>>  
<<IT HELPS TO IMPROVE MODEL ACCURACY>>  
<<IT IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH OR RANDOM SEARCH>>  

<<COMPARING PERFORMANCE>>  
<<GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES OUTPERFORMS MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES>>  
<<IT HAS HIGHER ACCURACY AND LOWER ERROR RATE>>  
<<IT IS MORE SUITED FOR CONTINUOUS DATA>>  
<<IT IS NOT SUITED FOR DISCRETE DATA>>  

<<MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL>>  
<<IS A VARIANT OF NAIVE BAYES FOR TEXT DATA>>  
<<IT USES BINARY FEATURES>>  
<<IT IS MORE SUITED FOR TEXT CLASSIFICATION>>  
<<IT HAS LOWER COMPLEXITY THAN GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES>>  

<<CURRENT>>  
<<IS A KEY VARIABLE IN MACHINE LEARNING>>  
<<IT REPRESENTS THE CURRENT STATE OF THE MODEL>>  
<<IT IS USED TO TRACK MODEL PERFORMANCE>>  
<<IT IS IMPORTANT
